parameters.formDescription: Enter your website URL. The automation detects your niche, finds related high-authority websites, and sends you a full backlink report by email.
parameters.formResponseText: Your backlink report is being generated. Check your email in a few minutes!

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'SUCCESS', reportId: d.reportId, website: d.cleanUrl, niche: d.detectedNiche, totalSites: d.totalSites, emailSentTo: d.email, completedAt: new Date().toISOString() } }];
